title: Minceraft Reversed
description: Replaces the common "Minecraft" logo with the cooler "Minceraft" one.
body:
This resource pack turns the "**Minceraft**" Easter Egg into the default logo for the game.

![The Minceraft logo in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LhJS8Idf/images/dd5f779287dc743a3c65589a8bf0f8a39df4c4a3.png)
